<!--
This template is for discussions about the code in this repo — architecture choices, refactoring proposals, "why is X done this way?" questions, or proposals for client-only changes.

If you want to report a bug in the app or request a feature, please file it in the feedback tracker instead:
  https://github.com/CherrelleTucker/forkit-feedback/issues

If you've found a security issue, use the private channel in SECURITY.md. Do NOT file it publicly.
-->
